chunks.text: THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Present: Mr. Justice Adnan Iqbal Chaudhry Mr. Justice Muhammad Jaffer Raza C. P. No. D – 5308 of 2025 [M/s. Haseeb Spinning Mills Ltd., versus FOP others] Petitioner: M/s. Haseeb Spinning Mills Ltd., through its Chairman / Director namely; Sheikh Mansoor Ahmed, who is present in person. Date of hearing: 03-11-2025 Date of decision: 03-11-2025 O R D E R Muhammad Jaffer Raza J.- Instant Petition has been filed by the Petitioner, who is being represented by its Chairman, Sheikh Mansoor Ahmed in the absence of any board resolution in his favour. The instant Petition essentially impugns orders of the Lahore High Court passed in C.M. No. 413 of 2003 in Execution No. 3/B of 2002. We have specifically confronted Mr. Sheikh Mansoor Ahmed as to how the instant Petition is maintainable against consent decree passed by the Lahore High Court and orders passed in the subsequent Execution application. The individual noted above, claiming to represent the Petitioner, has given no cogent reply to the query. In that respect office objection No. 1 and 5 are sustained. Consequently, the instant Petition is without merits and is dismissed in limine. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
